extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon attacked with 19km to go on Col d'Eze, gained 29 seconds maximum but ROGLIC limited losses to 9 seconds overall using WOUT van Aert's pacing support on descent.
tactical_patterns: MARTINEZ Danny attacked at 50km out on penultimate climb, forcing ROGLIC isolation early by dropping KRUIJSWIJK and DENNIS.
YATES gained 10 bonus seconds at La Chobé sprint before Col d'Eze, tactically reducing deficit before final climb.
Van Aert's descending pacemaking negated YATES 2-vs-1 disadvantage, proving domestique descent skills crucial for stage race defense.
QUINTANA attacked first on Col d'Eze but cracked, showing GC riders below podium couldn't sustain efforts at race end.

rider_signals.MARTINEZ Danny: negative: back wheel blowout on descent after strong attack at 50km suggests equipment/positioning issues under wet conditions
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: held only 9-second deficit after being isolated 46km out, breakthrough mentally on French stage race final day
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: 19km Col d'Eze attack nearly overturned 47-second deficit, first win since Giro 2021 signals return to form
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: stabilized 20-second gap on descent after being Roglic's only remaining teammate from 46km out
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: first to attack Col d'Eze but immediately cracked, suggesting lack of explosiveness for decisive late-race moves
